from dataclasses import dataclass, asdict
from typing import Any


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class Event:
    type: str
    payload: dict[str, Any]
    timestamp: float

    def __hash__(self):
        return hash((self.type, tuple(sorted(self.payload.items())), self.timestamp))


def deduplicate_events(events: list[Event]) -> list[Event]:
    seen: set[Event] = set()
    unique = []
    for event in events:
        if event not in seen:
            seen.add(event)
            unique.append(event)
    return unique


_cache: dict[tuple, dict] = {}


def _make_key(params: dict) -> tuple:
    return tuple(sorted(params.items()))


def get_cached_result(params: dict) -> dict | None:
    return _cache.get(_make_key(params))


def store_in_cache(params: dict, result: dict) -> None:
    _cache[_make_key(params)] = result
